_documentation: Build Believe Fit · Scout Engine seed file. Populate the leads[] array with athletes to ingest on the next orchestrator cycle. Schema matches the /api/v1/marketing/ingest body. Safe upsert by email · existing rows keep their funnel state. Real Playwright/HTTP scrapers should be added as new sources under marketing/agents/scout-engine.js _registerSources(), not by editing this file.

_example_lead.athlete_name: Required: full name as it appears publicly
_example_lead.discipline: Optional: e.g. Bodybuilding | Hybrid Athlete | Endurance | Powerlifting
_example_lead.public_profile_url: Optional: Strava | IG | YouTube | personal site
_example_lead.performance_notes: Optional: free-text · scraped training metrics, plateaus, observed bottlenecks
